subcodes.first_line: The Spirit hath been mentioned in the Book, that He was exalted in name and was born of His mother, and then dwelt in the kingdom for days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الروح فی الکتاب انه کان بالاسم علیا و ولد من امه ثم عاش فی الملک ایاما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @symbolism, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
